response.reasoning: The role targets a Director-level IC with 15+ years in engineering AND recognized AI expertise, cloud strategy advisory experience, and the ability to influence customers and partners at a strategic level. Bogdan has roughly 17-20 years of engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — the tenure bar is met. However, AI is very recent: the current re:cinq role (April 2025, ~2 months at time of resume) is the first where AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling appear. Prior roles are strong full-stack and backend engineering but show no sustained AI/ML focus. Education is a BS in CS plus a Fine Arts degree — no Master's or PhD in an AI field. Entrepreneurial signal exists via GISCollective (founder, open source, niche NGO market) and workshop/talk activity, but these are grassroots community contributions, not the kind of recognized industry-wide AI thought leadership the role implies. Cloud exposure includes AWS CDK and Kubernetes but is incidental, not a strategic specialization. The role requires advising strategic customers on AI adoption at executive level — there is no evidence of that kind of advisory or influencing experience in the resume.
strengths: Nearly 20 years of diverse engineering depth across web, backend, mobile, embedded, and infra — easily clears the 15-year minimum
Active knowledge-sharing culture: organized dojos, delivered conference talks (FOSS4G), ran multi-day workshops — signals the internal inspiration mandate
Founder/entrepreneurial streak (GISCollective) plus recent hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work shows builder credibility and appetite for emerging tech
concerns: AI expertise is extremely shallow and new — the only AI-focused role started April 2025 (~2 months), with no prior ML, LLM, or AI product track record
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI or related field, and no recognized published research, flagship AI product, or industry visibility in the AI space
No evidence of strategic customer advisory, executive-level cloud/AI consulting, or influencing at the partner/ecosystem level required for this Director-grade IC role
response.justification: Bogdan is a capable and well-rounded senior/staff engineer with genuine breadth, a community-oriented mindset, and early signs of interest in AI tooling, but the role demands a candidate who has spent years building or shipping AI-powered products at scale, advising enterprise customers on cloud and AI strategy, and maintaining recognized expertise in the AI field. The AI work here is incidental and very recent, there is no advanced AI education, and there is no track record of the strategic influencing or customer advisory this Principal/Director-level position requires.
